strengths: Demonstrated full-stack engineering fluency across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud systems with diverse tech stacks.
Active contributor to open-source AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq, including MCP code generators.
Proven track record of technical leadership through workshops, open-source projects, and cross-functional collaboration.
concerns: No explicit evidence of AI/ML product or platform development — AI-agent work is described as infrastructure/tooling, not strategic AI product design.
Lacks documented experience with cloud platform strategy or advising enterprise customers on AI/cloud adoption — focus remains on implementation, not strategic partnership.
No advanced degree in AI or related field; 15-year experience is confirmed but not anchored in AI-specific innovation or research.
response.justification: Despite broad engineering experience and open-source contributions, the candidate lacks demonstrable leadership in building or strategizing AI-powered products, advising on cloud-AI adoption at scale, or holding advanced AI credentials — all core to the director-level, strategy-focused role.
